'''Mierme Unill''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Mierme Unill was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Dispatched to the planet of [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]] as a Knight, Unill was tasked with investigating the murder of two Mon Gazzan [[Ore/Legends|ore]] traders. Upon further investigation, Unill discovered that a young [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] named [[Zett Jukassa/Legends|Zett Jukassa]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] was having [[Force vision/Legends|visions]] of the crime scene. Upon reviewing the boy's records, Unill discovered that the young Jukassa was indeed the son of the ore traders.<ref name="db">{{DB|character|zettjukassa|Jukassa, Zett}}</ref>

Seeing potential in the boy's visions, Unill petitioned the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to allow him to reveal the murder of his parents to Jukassa. Receiving approval from the Council, Unill told Jukassa all that she had learned, and with the Initiate's visions becoming clearer, Unill was able to trace the murders back to the criminal organization known as [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. Making several arrests, Unill was able to successfully close the case. Having been impressed with Jukassa's calm demeanor and detachment as he learned of his parents' deaths and aided in the investigation, Unill selected the child as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], training him in the ways of the Force as they traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="db" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Unill took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the newly formed [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. During the war, Unill was [[Death/Legends|slain]], and Jukassa was left orphaned, permanently assigned to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] where [[Battlemaster/Legends|Temple battlemaster]] [[Cin Drallig/Legends|Cin Drallig]] took over his training.<ref name="db" /> Jukassa himself would later fall in battle at the [[19 BBY/Legends|end]] of the war, gunned down by [[Fox (501st Legion)/Legends|Sergeant Fox]] during [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]].
